verse_text: But Hezekiah did not repay the favor shown him, but exalted his own heart, and His anger came upon him, and upon Judah and Jerusalem.

links.context: At the time of his physical affliction, Hezekiah had also become afflicted with pride (see [[2CH.32:25]], [[2CH.32:26]]). By telling him of his imminent death, the Lord revealed Himself to Hezekiah, who wept loudly. He humbled himself and prayed, and immediately, Isaiah was given a new word for the king: healing and another fifteen years of life.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
